events.title: Anonymous launches cyberattacks against Iranian government
events.summary: The group Anonymous took responsibility for a series of cyberattacks against the Iranian government that took down two main Iranian government websites and the websites of several state media organizations.

events.title: Huge Networks基础设施被入侵，用于发起针对巴西ISP的DDoS攻击
events.summary: 攻击者利用Huge Networks公司CEO的私有SSH密钥，通过入侵其基础设施，构建了一个基于Mirai恶意软件变体的僵尸网络。该僵尸网络利用易受CVE-2023-1389漏洞影响的TP-Link路由器，对巴西的其他ISP发起大规模的DNS反射和放大DDoS攻击。
